_comment: Codex CLI hooks. Reuses the SAME scripts as Claude Code (.claude/hooks/). Codex's hook event names and command-hook contract mirror Claude Code's. The scripts read tool input as JSON on stdin and exit 2 to block. VERIFY: Codex's stdin field names must match what the scripts expect (tool_input.command / tool_input.file_path). If they differ in your Codex version, the scripts fail OPEN (no-op) — test with a known-bad command before relying on the block. See HARNESS.md.
